enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, capturing the essence of longing and connection.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Nizhalgal.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on November 6, 1980.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Idhu Oru Ponmaalai Poludhu, the listener is taken on a melodic journey that beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and nostalgia. The song's lyrics evoke a sense of longing, perfectly complemented by the soothing music composed by Ilaiyaraaja. As it plays in the backdrop of Nizhalgal, it enhances the emotional depth of the scenes, making it a memorable piece. The heartfelt rendition by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam adds to its timeless charm, making it a favorite among fans of classic Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhu Oru Ponmaalai Poludhu is a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song transports listeners to a world of beautiful memories. Experience the magic of Nizhalgal through its poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu.
stanzaMeanings: The daughter of the sky is shining, this is a golden flower.
A thousand colors fill the night at the doorway.
The sky has a bridge for the night, and the singing birds are resting.
Do flowers bloom on the trees...?
This is a golden flower, the daughter of the sky is shining, this is a golden flower.
The sky gives me a tree that will always provide me with news.
One day, the world will seek justice, and on that great day, it will come looking for you.
With questions, I will create answers. This is a golden flower.
The daughter of the sky is shining, this is a golden flower.
